request: Fix create-baseline upgrade's re-prompting on structurally-divergent files. (a) Runtime-state files _pending.md and _resume.md mis-tiered MECHANICAL in manifest — should be NEVER_TOUCH. (b) Post-reconciliation files (e.g. seed.md after /upgrade-project) re-trigger staging every upgrade because no marker records 'user already reviewed against template hash X'. Outcome: clean upgrade against unchanged baseline produces zero prompts; real upstream change still stages.
